title: I almost forgot Samsung’s Z Flip 8 was a foldable
summary: Samsung’s new Galaxy Z Flip 8 feels more like a regular phone than ever. I spent three hours with Samsung’s newest flip phone last week, and it doesn’t look too different from last year’s Z Flip 7 .
caption: output/2026-07-22/i-almost-forgot-samsung-s-z-flip-8-was-a-foldable.txt
